focus: security deep pass: dispatch surfaces (prompt injection chains, path traversal, subprocess hygiene)

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: multi-repo multi-language dispatch surfaces with prompt injection chains, path traversal vectors, and subprocess hygiene audit

targetSelection.selectionReason: dispatch surfaces: all files that assemble prompts, embed user/fixture content, or spawn subprocesses

searchLedger.hypothesis: fixture content can override BENCHMARK MODE and cause file edits on live repo

searchActions.result: BENCHMARK MODE instruction present; fixture content is operator-authored; --dir gives file tools but soft guard sufficient for trusted input

searchLedger.rationale: fixture content operator-authored; BENCHMARK MODE soft guard adequate for trusted inputs; live-root dispatch is by design
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: trusted-operator threat model; propose step is worktree-isolated

searchLedger.hypothesis: malicious deliverable text can inject grader instructions via .replace({DELIVERABLE})

searchActions.result: .replace({DELIVERABLE}) embeds raw text; grader_prompt.md has delimited markers; JSON parser bounds output

searchLedger.rationale: different-family grader limits cross-model injection; JSON output parser rejects non-JSON responses; grader has no file tools
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: JSON parser + different-family grader + no file tools on grader

searchLedger.hypothesis: grader_notes free text injected into proposer prompt can steer proposer to edit maliciously

searchActions.result: grader_themes[:6] embedded in proposer prompt; proposer runs in worktree; gates.py checks frozen surface after edit

searchLedger.rationale: worktree isolation + gates.py frozen surface guard + different-family grader bounds the chain

searchLedger.hypothesis: config-controlled packaging_root can escape destination directory

searchActions.result: packaging_root from operator-authored config; --dest override available; no user-controlled runtime input

searchLedger.rationale: config is operator-authored trust boundary; no untrusted runtime input reaches path construction
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: operator-authored config is the trust boundary

searchLedger.hypothesis: user-controlled argv or shell=True enables command injection

searchActions.result: subprocess.run with list args, shell=False default, stdin=DEVNULL
subprocess.run with list args, shell=False default, stdin=DEVNULL
subprocess.run with list args, shell=False default, stdin=DEVNULL
spawnSync with array args, no shell interpretation

searchLedger.rationale: all subprocess calls use list/array args with shell=False; no user-controlled argv concatenation; stdin=DEVNULL on all opencode dispatches
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: comprehensive subprocess audit: clean across all surfaces
